name: Victoria Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light.
2. Gradually add the sugar and continue to beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Sift in the flour and baking powder, then fold them into the mixture until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into prepared 8-inch round pans.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes at 375°F (190°C) until the cake easily pulls away from the sides of the pan or a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean with no wet spots.
7. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for about 10 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Whip the cream and sugar until soft peaks form.
9. Place a doily on a serving plate.
10. Put one cake layer onto the doily, spreading with raspberry jam.
11. Top with whipped cream.
12. Place the second layer on top with the bottom side facing down.
13. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
14. Garnish with raspberries and mint leaves.
This recipe is based on the original from The Birmingham News on Wednesday, July 27th, 1994.
